title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, World Government, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Behold the day clan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That loathsome lineage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've been hated since their ancestors' time. Not one would even try to show them an'! Love!

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: Sever their bloodline!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are they buccaneers too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's too dangerous to allow them to live!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait! Don't throw things at them yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Exterminate them!! This day! Will go down in history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quit throwing knives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be penalized if they die prematurely! Waha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sever their blog!!we!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is quite the find, darling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can only credit fate for it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, let's introduce the favorites for the individual competition!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's too late for me, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My little ones... I want them to be raised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: By someone with a warm heart... please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't hand them over to him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and your children may be strangers to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But I want to help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: if I can't do that much... then I've no business standing here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are 150 rare "Rabbits" to hunt down!! That's not to mention the 13 Super Rare Ones!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: JWOTAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of those is worth 10,000 points a piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one hour before the hunt begins!! Now run little rabbits...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this a joke?! are they really gonna kill us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Give us a good chase!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can hold out for three weeks, we'll make it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All we can do is run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Find a good hiding spot somewhere!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let the hunt begin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are they? Where are they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WaAah!! EEAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please don't cry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "You rabbits!')

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please spare our child!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I beg of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
